title: Where to buy Panini FIFA 2026 in Buenos Aires
checkedNote: Checked Jul 9, 2026 via BrightData search/scrape, Google Places API, ZonaKids/WOWCO/Golmarymar/Figu Shop/Cover Cell product pages, PedidosYa Market + Mercado Libre Tienda Oficial listings, Coca-Cola/Panini exchange PDFs, Activa Distribuidora, Figus del Mundial, Carrefour announcements, Microcentro/Once seller Instagram + Tiendeo hours, and Argentine press (A24, Infobae, La Nación, Perfil), and PedidosYa/Rappi store pages for supermarket delivery links.
scamWarning: New Rita / Panini warn they do not sell or offer pickup at Cuyo 2414, Martínez (office only). Pay only via Mercado Pago on zonakids.com. Avoid CBU/alias transfers to strangers and lookalike domains (e.g. tiendapaniniargentina.com is not the official Panini store — use zonakids.com / Tienda Oficial on Mercado Libre). Prefer Tienda Oficial sellers on Mercado Libre.

sellers.name: WOWCO — caja ×1000
sellers.products: Caja de Figuritas Copa Mundial FIFA 2026 Panini ×1000
sellers.description: AMBA-focused Panini wholesaler listing a sealed FIFA 2026 box of 1,000 packs. Aimed at kiosks/commerce but also takes particular orders. Strong bulk option when official sticker boxes are unavailable.

sellers.name: Activa Distribuidora
sellers.fullAddress: 25 de Mayo 2387, Santa Fe, Santa Fe
sellers.products: Single packs + caja with 1,000 stickers; album also listed
sellers.description: Wholesale kiosk distributor with Panini FIFA 2026 sticker SKUs and volume pricing from 1,000 packs. Not in CABA — Santa Fe capital — but a clear verified bulk sticker channel. Ships; WhatsApp +54 9 342 485-0522.

sellers.name: Figu Shop
sellers.hours: Online · same-day AMBA if ordered before 14:00
sellers.products: FIFA 2026 packs ×25/×50/×100; soft/hard album combos; Adrenalyn XL
sellers.description: BrightData-verified Tienda Nube distributor with official Panini FIFA 2026 SKUs. Jul 9: pack ×25 at ARS 54,999 (last units messaging); larger bundle availability rotates. IG/TikTok mention retiro in Floresta, CABA — no public street pin; confirm pickup on WhatsApp 11 5124-4613. Envío gratis a sucursal over ARS 130,000.

sellers.name: Mercado Libre — Tienda Oficial Panini
sellers.priceNote: No stable ARS/pack · official listings rotate
sellers.products: Albums, pack kits, Adrenalyn; filter Tienda Oficial
sellers.description: BrightData scrape of Tienda Oficial Panini on Mercado Libre shows active FIFA 2026 albums and pack kits. Prefer the official store badge over third-party resellers. Good for bulk kits when official sticker boxes are unavailable; prices and stock change fast.

sellers.name: Cover Cell Devoto
sellers.fullAddress: Devoto, CABA (near Shopping Devoto; confirm pickup details after checkout)
sellers.products: FIFA 2026 pack ×25; pack ×25 + organizer kit
sellers.description: BrightData and regular search both show Cover Cell listing official Panini FIFA 2026 pack bundles with schema.org InStock. It is a Devoto retailer near Shopping Devoto, with Mercado Envíos/Flex and public pickup hours. Price is well above MSRP, so compare before buying.

sellers.name: Golmarymar Caballito
sellers.products: Panini / New Rita line; homepage features Figuritas Oficiales World Cup 2026
sellers.description: Distribuidora Mar y Mar (Golmarymar) Caballito — Google Places OPERATIONAL, ★4.6 (77). Candy/kiosk wholesaler carrying Panini; site currently highlights official World Cup 2026 stickers. Good CABA bulk pickup for multi-pack buys. Tel 011 4924-7638.

sellers.name: Golmarymar Mataderos
sellers.fullAddress: Av. Juan Bautista Alberdi 5918, C1440 CABA
sellers.products: Panini line via Golmarymar
sellers.description: Second Golmarymar branch (Places ★4.5, 103 reviews). Same wholesaler promoting FIFA 2026 stickers. Tel 011 4686-3198. Confirm stock before a Mataderos trip.

sellers.name: Megafigus
sellers.products: Sticker wholesale (Panini-focused shop)
sellers.description: Google Places: “Distribuidora Mayorista de Figuritas”, OPERATIONAL, ★3.3 (165). Dedicated figuritas wholesaler in CABA — ask specifically for FIFA 2026 sealed boxes/packs before visiting.

sellers.name: ZonaKids — Adrenalyn XL display ×24
sellers.products: Adrenalyn XL trading-card display (not stickers)
sellers.description: Confirmed in stock on ZonaKids. Panini FIFA 2026 card line (Adrenalyn XL), not sticker album packs. Best official sealed card bulk buy available from the official store.

sellers.name: Carrefour Hipermercado Salguero
sellers.products: Soft album + sealed packs (Hiper/Market/Maxi; Express often packs only)
sellers.description: Carrefour officially stocks the collection chain-wide. This Palermo hiper (Places ★4.2, 8,086) is a strong CABA stop for buying many packs at MSRP. Press notes supers restock more reliably than kiosks. Call ahead: 0800-444-8484.

delivery.evidence: Rappi lists Carrefour Hiper Salguero at Jerónimo Salguero 3212.

sellers.name: Jumbo Palermo Bullrich
sellers.products: Packs and sometimes albums (Cencosud)
sellers.description: Large Jumbo (Places ★4.2, 21,687). Part of the supermarket channel A24/Infobae flag for steadier sticker supply vs barrio kiosks. Good for stacking packs in one visit.

delivery.evidence: PedidosYa lists Jumbo Palermo for delivery (Bullrich / Portal Palermo channel). No matching Rappi store pin for Bullrich 345 on the Jumbo brand page.

sellers.name: Coto Hipermercado Santa Fe
sellers.products: Packs and albums when available
sellers.description: Major Coto hiper (Places ★4.1, 15,631). Repeatedly named with Jumbo/Carrefour/Disco/Vea as better-stocked than kiosks for sealed packs.

delivery.evidence: Rappi lists Coto Palermo at Av. Santa Fe 3760.

sellers.name: Disco Av. Santa Fe
sellers.products: Packs and albums when available
sellers.description: 24h Disco (Places ★3.7, 2,250). Useful late-night restock hunt on the Santa Fe corridor with Coto/Jumbo nearby.

delivery.evidence: Rappi lists Disco at Av. Santa Fe 3047.

sellers.name: Vea Larrea
sellers.products: Packs and albums when available
sellers.description: Vea (Cencosud) named alongside Disco/Jumbo in press for better supermarket supply. Central Recoleta pin (Places ★3.8, 2,266).

delivery.evidence: Rappi lists Vea Larrea at Larrea 833.

sellers.name: PedidosYa Market Villa Crespo
sellers.fullAddress: Av. Juan Bautista Justo 2261, C1414 CABA
sellers.hours: Delivery via PedidosYa app · hours vary
sellers.products: Figuritas Panini Copa Mundial FIFA 2026; albums when listed
sellers.description: BrightData/Google hits confirm PedidosYa Market menus listing FIFA 2026 packs at ~ARS 2,000. Villa Crespo dark-store pin on Places (★3.2). Handy for a few packs via delivery; users report per-order caps (e.g. ~3 packs). Check the app for your zone — not a bulk channel.

delivery.evidence: Native PedidosYa Market Villa Crespo menu; FIFA 2026 packs appear in app search.

sellers.name: Coca-Cola × Panini exchange points
sellers.address: Carrefour Express and other official exchange points
sellers.fullAddress: Multiple CABA/GBA exchange points listed by Coca-Cola Argentina
sellers.products: Special 3-sticker envelope: 1 Coca-Cola sticker + 2 general album stickers
sellers.description: Official Coca-Cola/Panini promotion. Exchange two marked Coca-Cola caps plus ARS 1,000 at listed CABA/GBA points. Microcentro/Retiro Express pins in the FEMSA PDF include Esmeralda 823, Esmeralda 1040, and Tucumán 831 (plus many Caballito/Recoleta/Palermo/Belgrano/Flores stops). Not a bulk pack source, but useful for the Coca-Cola section.

sellers.name: Carrefour Express Esmeralda
sellers.products: Sealed packs (Express usually packs only; albums at Hiper/Market)
sellers.description: Closest confirmed Carrefour Express to Florida/Lavalle for MSRP packs. Chain-wide Panini launch covers Express for figuritas; stock rotates fast downtown. Call 0800-444-8484 before a dedicated trip.

sellers.name: Carrefour Express Tucumán
sellers.products: Sealed packs; listed in Coca-Cola/Panini FEMSA exchange PDF
sellers.description: Second Microcentro Express stop (San Nicolás). Useful if Esmeralda is empty; also appears as a Coca-Cola × Panini canje point. Confirm pack stock in store — Express inventory is thin vs hipers.

sellers.name: Cotillón Homero
sellers.priceNote: No listed ARS/pack · pack ×50+ better price
sellers.products: Official Panini FIFA 2026 packs; albums; portafiguritas
sellers.description: Once cotillón/mayorista ~15–20 min walk from Microcentro. Jul 2026 Instagram/TikTok show official Panini Mundial packs with pack ×50+ volume pricing and repeated “últimas unidades” restocks. WhatsApp 11 5479-1746 — confirm price/stock before going.

sellers.name: Casa Facai
sellers.fullAddress: Tte. Gral. Juan Domingo Perón 2451, Once / Balvanera, CABA
sellers.priceNote: No listed ARS/pack · ask in store / WhatsApp
sellers.products: Álbumes + figuritas Panini FIFA 2026 (Argentina edition heavily promoted)
sellers.description: Once mayorista with heavy Jul 2026 social proof for Mundial albums and packs (IG/TikTok @casafacaimayorista). Second pickup note: Azcuénaga 223. Online shop is mostly plush/stationery — figuritas stock is in-store; WhatsApp 11 2785-5136 / 11 6123-4837.

sellers.name: Lo de Max (Lodemax)
sellers.products: Panini figuritas/cartas (official distributor); WC 2026 accessories confirmed
sellers.description: Juguetería mayorista that brands itself Distribuidor Oficial Panini. Strong Once stop for sealed Panini lines; recent posts emphasize Mundial accessories/portafiguritas and prior Club World Cup stickers — ask specifically for FIFA 2026 sealed packs. WhatsApp +54 9 11 3169-6510.

sellers.name: El Mundo del Juguete Florida
sellers.priceNote: No listed ARS/pack · confirm in store
sellers.products: Álbumes + figuritas Panini (Argentina/Brasil editions promoted by chain)
sellers.description: Main Microcentro toy stop on Florida (Places ★4.4). Chain IG has promoted permanent stock of Panini Mundial albums/packs (Argentina + Brasil). Also nearby Florida 648. Still confirm shelf stock — juguetería inventory turns over fast.

sellers.name: Kiosco Rafa
sellers.products: Figuritas & álbumes Panini (shop name)
sellers.description: Top Google hit for “figuritas Panini Mundial 2026 Buenos Aires” — Places name includes “Figuritas - Albumes Panini Argentina”, ★4 (194). Dedicated sticker kiosk on Corrientes. Tel 011 4867-1270.

sellers.name: Kiosco Chocomarket Figuritas
sellers.fullAddress: Combate de los Pozos 185, C1079 CABA
sellers.products: Figuritas-focused kiosk
sellers.description: Places listing “Kiosco chocomarket figuritas” (★4.8, 30). Another CABA specialist stop when supers are empty. Tel 011 2237-8252.

sellers.name: ZonaKids — albums only
sellers.products: Softcover, hardcover; Gold edition rotates
sellers.description: Confirmed Jul 9: softcover and tapa dura albums add-to-cart. Gold and sticker-combo availability rotates. Buy the album here at official price while hunting packs elsewhere.

sellers.name: Figus del Mundial
sellers.priceNote: No pack price · loose stickers only
sellers.products: Individual Panini FIFA 2026 stickers; pickup or Vía Cargo
sellers.description: CABA pickup for missing stickers, not sealed bulk boxes. Order online, then collect at Olleros 4198. Useful once you have packs and need specific numbers.

sellers.name: Figuritas.ar — El Club de las Figus
sellers.fullAddress: Lambaré 861, C1185 Almagro, CABA · weekend exchange Av. Patricias Argentinas 441-455
sellers.hours: Shop: check IG · Weekend exchange Sat–Sun ~9:00–19:00 at Parque Centenario
sellers.products: Intercambio and loose FIFA 2026 stickers
sellers.description: Instagram/Facebook list sealed packs + albums at Lambaré 861, Almagro (geocoded). Places also lists weekend intercambio at Parque Centenario (★4.6). Useful for loose trades and local pickup — not a sealed ×1000 wholesaler. Tel 011 2532-6408.

sellers.name: Neighborhood kiosks & newsstands
sellers.fullAddress: CABA and AMBA · stock and price vary by corner
sellers.products: Single packs; albums often missing
sellers.description: Traditional channel, but UKRA/Infobae report thin deliveries and overpricing while supers get priority. Fine for a few packs at ARS 2,000; skip markups. Prefer supers or wholesalers for volume.
